ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: tomato sauce 40 % (water, sunflower oil, tomato paste, sugar, vinegar, wine, salt, mustard seeds, spices), tuna (fish) 32 %, vegetable 28 % (carrot, turnip, green tomato, cucumber, green and red pepper, celery stalk).
